_note: Prereq: a running hello-dcs for the ephemeral demo (deployed first, heredoc so $DCS_REGISTRY expands). The PVC is RWO on crc-csi-hostpath-provisioner (WaitForFirstConsumer), so it only binds once a pod mounts it — the plan deploys the stateful app BEFORE verify-pvc-bound (the content checks it earlier, which works only on an Immediate-binding class). DCS_STORAGE_CLASS is set for CRC. CRC's session SCC is RunAsAny so it assigns no fsGroup and the mounted volume stays root-owned (non-root container can't write); the plan patches an explicit fsGroup — real DCS restricted-v2 auto-assigns one, so the workshop manifest stays portable.

steps.run:
oc apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: hello-dcs
  labels: {app: hello-dcs}
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector: {matchLabels: {app: hello-dcs}}
  template:
    metadata: {labels: {app: hello-dcs}}
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: hello-dcs
        image: ${DCS_REGISTRY}/samples/hello-dcs:1.0
        ports: [{containerPort: 8080}]
EOF
oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
oc exec deployment/hello-dcs -- sh -c 'echo written-inside-the-container > /tmp/note; cat /tmp/note'
oc delete pod -l app=hello-dcs && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s

DCS_STORAGE_CLASS=crc-csi-hostpath-provisioner envsubst < ~/exercises/deployment-stateful.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=merge -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"securityContext":{"fsGroup":1000700000}}}}}' && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
oc delete pod -l app=hello-dcs && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
